theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

narrative.summary: Micron: 정량 종합 69점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 59 / 중기 68 / 장기 76. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 과열
overheat.guidance: 조정(10~15% 하락) 기다리는 게 안전. 지금은 관망.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 8.7% → 2-ATR 손절폭 17.4%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 3개 시그널 합류 — Value Area High, Fib 0.5, Swing High. 현재가 대비 +32.9% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $468.7 아래 손절가 $375 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

narrative.summary: Nebius: 정량 종합 67점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 62 / 중기 68 / 장기 70. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

top_news.title: Asian Stocks to Track US Drop on Inflation Fears: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Asian stocks were set to follow Wall Street lower after mounting inflation concerns pushed the yield on the longest-dated US Treasury bond to its highest level since 2007.

top_news.title: Oil Holds Decline as Traders Weigh Trump’s Latest Iran Threats
top_news.summary: Oil held a modest decline, as traders shrugged off President Donald Trump’s newest threat to resume strikes on Iran, a pledge the US leader has made repeatedly before backing off since a truce was agreed to in early April.

top_news.title: New HSBC Report Reveals Gap in Addressing Women's Financial Goals
top_news.summary:
Racquel Oden, HSBC head of international wealth and private banking, said that while women have financial literacy, many feel that they don't have the fluency to make the right decisions about their finances by themselves. 
Oden, who joined the show alongside Bloomberg senior editor Claire Obusan, broke down a new report from HSBC that revealed women feel that traditional financial advice doesn't address the complexity of their financial goals.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Massive Options Bet Rattles Oil Market On Edge Over Iran War
top_news.summary: A huge options bet Tuesday on Brent crude prices plunging rattled oil traders already on high alert for unusual flows, as Iran war headlines continue to whipsaw prices and regulators probe suspicious trading.

top_news.title: Big Treasury Block Sales Drive ‘Capitulation’ Selloff in Bonds
top_news.summary: A series of large sales in US Treasury futures exacerbated a selloff in the $31 trillion government debt market, as concern about resurgent inflation pushed investors to price in higher interest rates.

top_news.title: Stocks Fall for Third Day as Semiconductor Shares Erase Rebound
top_news.summary: US stocks retreated for a third day, weighed down by rising bond yields and the threat of entrenched inflation. Semiconductor shares erased an afternoon rebound, with Nvidia Corp. declining ahead of results due Wednesday.

top_news.title: Saks Global CEO on Next Steps in Bankruptcy Process, Path To Growth
top_news.summary: Saks Global CEO Geoffroy van Raemdonck discusses the progress the company has made since filing for bankruptcy. He discusses what the luxury retail space looks like for the brands that do business with Saks and what role brick and mortar stores will play going forward. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Aspen Group Eyes New Investors to Address Debt as Earnings Slump
top_news.summary: The Aspen Group, the owner of one of the largest dental care chains in the US, is exploring tapping outside investors to tackle the maturities of roughly $3 billion of loans due next year amid weaker earnings, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: Stocks Fall as Fed-Hike Anxiety Lifts Bond Yields: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: The latest bout of weakness in bonds lifted yields to multi-year highs, reducing the appetite for stocks on speculation that a torrid market surge has gone too far amid war-fueled inflation risks.

top_news.title: US 30-Year Yield Hits Highest Since 2007 as Selloff Deepens
top_news.summary: Yields on the US Treasury’s longest-dated bond rose to the highest level in almost two decades as investor concerns mount that accelerating inflation will force central bankers to raise interest rates.
